# File patterns that must never appear on the main branch.
# Main is the engine-agnostic spec. Engine code belongs on engine branches.

# Unity
*.cs
*.meta
*.unity
*.prefab
*.asset
*.asmdef
Packages/manifest.json

# Unreal
*.cpp
*.hpp
*.h
*.uasset
*.umap
*.uplugin
*.uproject

# Engine directories
Assets/
Source/
